text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Needle Series—the grand stage where
humans augmented by acupuncture race each
other for ultimate supremacy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today will be our first step towards conquering
that series—the day of the Bamboo Stakes.
choice_data_list: This should be the meeting place...

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Beauty
text_block_list.text:
Oh! <username>, please help
meee!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! I knew it, I'm just not me without my charismatic Miracle Shining Sunglasses!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, absolutely! Without them, I have nothing but worries! For a genius acupuncturist-slash-trainer like me, they're almost as important as life itself!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But alas! They got blown by the wind into the
back of a truck, then the truck carried them far,
far away, then they were picked up by a stray
dog—

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Sadly, yes... Sniffle... Please, you must help me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, there's still time until I have to run in
the Bamboo Stakes, so Sasami Anshinzawa and I
decide to look for her sunglasses together.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: They're not here...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Nor here...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Or even here...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look! The dog underneath the overpass!
That's the one!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've finally caught up to you now! Return my
sunglasses at once!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
They're a family heirloom, and um... also
represent the wearer's determination to be a
beacon of reassurance to Umamusume!
choice_data_list: Those glasses have such deep lore!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
In the Legend of the Anshinzawas... It was, uh...
Yasuzaemon Anshinzawa? Who said something
along those lines! Probably! ♪

text_block_list.name: Stray Dog
text_block_list.text: Grrrrrowl!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right as the stray dog poises to strike, I seize the
opportunity and snatch the sunglasses away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even stray dogs are no match for me now... I bask
in my feeling of accomplishment as I hand the
sunglasses back to Sasami Anshinzawa.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Swoon... ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Phew, looks like we somehow made it on time. ♪
Feeling ready?
choice_data_list: To tell you the truth, I'm a bit nervous...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course you would be! This is where my needles
come in handy! Let me give your Courageous
Challenger chakra a little poke! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy! It's my way of saying thanks for
recovering my family heirloom! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Here I go! Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Strangely enough, as soon as she pokes me, all
feelings of doubt disappear from my mind, and an
abundance of power wells up in me!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Wow! I really did it! I knew it was worth a shot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I start towards the race track in high spirits, but...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hold on! I have something for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she pokes me, my anxiety begins to
grow in intensity. At this rate, I feel like my
nervousness will completely overwhelm me!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: W-wait... Did that not work? It didn't?!
choice_data_list: D-don't worry, I'll win with sheer determination!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly start towards the race track in an
attempt to shake off the heavy feeling, but...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hold on! I have something for you!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Here! Take my Miracle Shining Sunglasses! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you look great in them! ♪ With those on,
you'll have nothing to worry about!
choice_data_list: But aren't these really important to you?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
No need to hold back! We've been through thick
and thin together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly why I feel confident entrusting
them to you! ☆ Get out there and break a leg!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sunglasses bestowed upon me imbue my body
with great strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've heard stories of signature racewear bringing
out the wearer's inner strength, which means...
choice_data_list:
(These sunglasses must be my very own
signature racewear!)

(These sunglasses must be my very own
signature racewear!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that Sasami Anshinzawa is cheering me
on from the stands, I run with all my might in
hopes of winning the trophy for her!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
In a magnificent performance,
<chrname>'s trainer has crossed the
finish line in first place!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Like a shooting star, he's appeared out of
nowhere and taken the Bamboo Stakes by storm!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Like a shooting star, she's appeared out of
nowhere and taken the Bamboo Stakes by storm!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! You did it,
<username>!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd be able to do it, partner! ♪ Time to
keep winning all the way to the top!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to get another pair of those sunglasses
from the dollar store too! ☆
